reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Una VERGÜENZA lo que tardan en atenderte, pareciera que estás cargando combustible en la NASA para poner un cohete en órbita
Tengo dudas si los empleados lo hacen adrede sino no se entiende la pasividad que tienen para atender

(Translated by Google)
It's a SHAME how long it takes to serve you. It's like you're loading fuel at NASA to put a rocket into orbit.
I have doubts if the employees do this on purpose, otherwise, their inactivity in serving you is incomprehensible.

reviews.comment:
Desastre necesario xq no hay muchas opciones para cargar nafta, en temporada y fuera de ella , los empleados pareciera que uno les va a pedir un favor, y su local es un kiosco más, no piensen q.encontraran un full

(Translated by Google)
A necessary disaster because there aren't many options for filling up with gas, in season or out of season. The employees act like you're asking them for a favor, and their place is just another kiosk; don't expect to find a full service station.
